'''zotawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:sable|sable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-t-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sable|sable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zotawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zotawithi|zotawithi]] || [[word:zotawiji|zotawiji]] || [[word:zotawishi|zotawishi]] || [[word:zotawiki|zotawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zotawuthuthu|zotawuthuthu]] || [[word:zotawujuju|zotawujuju]] || [[word:zotawushushu|zotawushushu]] || [[word:zotawukuku|zotawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zotawuthu|zotawuthu]] || [[word:zotawuju|zotawuju]] || [[word:zotawushu|zotawushu]] || [[word:zotawuku|zotawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zotawufthuf|zotawufthuf]] || [[word:zotawufjuf|zotawufjuf]] || [[word:zotawufshuf|zotawufshuf]] || [[word:zotawufkuf|zotawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zotawethe|zotawethe]] || [[word:zotaweje|zotaweje]] || [[word:zotaweshe|zotaweshe]] || [[word:zotaweke|zotaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zotawothotho|zotawothotho]] || [[word:zotawojojo|zotawojojo]] || [[word:zotawoshosho|zotawoshosho]] || [[word:zotawokoko|zotawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zotawotho|zotawotho]] || [[word:zotawojo|zotawojo]] || [[word:zotawosho|zotawosho]] || [[word:zotawoko|zotawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zotawofthof|zotawofthof]] || [[word:zotawofjof|zotawofjof]] || [[word:zotawofshof|zotawofshof]] || [[word:zotawofkof|zotawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zotawÃŸfthÃŸf|zotawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zotawÃŸfjÃŸf|zotawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zotawÃŸfshÃŸf|zotawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zotawÃŸfkÃŸf|zotawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zotawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|zotawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zotawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|zotawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zotawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|zotawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zotawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|zotawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zotawÃŸfthÃŸf|zotawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zotawÃŸfjÃŸf|zotawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zotawÃŸfshÃŸf|zotawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zotawÃŸfkÃŸf|zotawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zotawÃŸfthÃŸf|zotawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zotawÃŸfjÃŸf|zotawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zotawÃŸfshÃŸf|zotawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zotawÃŸfkÃŸf|zotawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zotawÃḊthÃḊ|zotawÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:zotawÃḊjÃḊ|zotawÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:zotawÃḊshÃḊ|zotawÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:zotawÃḊkÃḊ|zotawÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zotawathatha|zotawathatha]] || [[word:zotawajaja|zotawajaja]] || [[word:zotawashasha|zotawashasha]] || [[word:zotawakaka|zotawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zotawatha|zotawatha]] || [[word:zotawaja|zotawaja]] || [[word:zotawasha|zotawasha]] || [[word:zotawaka|zotawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zotawafthaf|zotawafthaf]] || [[word:zotawafjaf|zotawafjaf]] || [[word:zotawafshaf|zotawafshaf]] || [[word:zotawafkaf|zotawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zotawasha|zotawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zotawshÃḋsha|zotawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zotawrosha|zotawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zotawmusha|zotawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zotawyasha|zotawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozotawnkshÃḋsha|gozotawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozotawnkrosha|gozotawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozotawnkmusha|gozotawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozotawnkyasha|gozotawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zotatawasha|zotatawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zotatawshÃḋsha|zotatawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zotatawrosha|zotatawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zotatawmusha|zotatawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zotatawyasha|zotatawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozotatawnkshÃḋsha|gozotatawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozotatawnkrosha|gozotatawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozotatawnkmusha|gozotatawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozotatawnkyasha|gozotatawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zetÃḊwasha|zetÃḊwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zetÃḊwshÃḋsha|zetÃḊwshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zetÃḊwrosha|zetÃḊwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zetÃḊwmusha|zetÃḊwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zetÃḊwyasha|zetÃḊwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozetÃḊwnkshÃḋsha|gozetÃḊwnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozetÃḊwnkrosha|gozetÃḊwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozetÃḊwnkmusha|gozetÃḊwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozetÃḊwnkyasha|gozetÃḊwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zotfawasha|zotfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zotfawshÃḋsha|zotfawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zotfawrosha|zotfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zotfawmusha|zotfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zotfawyasha|zotfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozotfawnkshÃḋsha|gozotfawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozotfawnkrosha|gozotfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozotfawnkmusha|gozotfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozotfawnkyasha|gozotfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
